content.speakerText: I just finished the Q3 report—hope it meets your expectations.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚做完第三季度报告，希望符合你的期望。

options.text: This is next-level work. You saved us so much time!
Did you use the template I sent?
Maybe you could do it faster next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调具体价值（省时）和高水平（next-level），符合职场赞美原则。其他选项要么消极（opt_1）、无关（opt_3），要么批评性（opt_4），不符合赞美语境。

content.speakerText: Thanks, I really appreciate you saying that.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢，我很感激你这么说。

options.text: Can you send me the file again?

content.explanation: 正确答案肯定对方价值并鼓励持续表现（keep killing it），是积极回应。opt_1 和 opt_3 抑制赞美（贬低自己的反馈），opt_4 完全偏离语境。

content.speakerText: I managed to launch the client presentation ahead of schedule.
content.speakerTextCn: 我提前完成了客户演示文稿的发布。

options.text: Wow, the design is so colorful!
That’s incredible—your initiative really made the difference.
I guess that’s good, but did you check the spelling?
I’m busy right now, can we talk later?

content.explanation: 正确答案具体指出对方的主动性（initiative）和影响（made the difference），符合职场赞美原则。opt_1 赞美无关细节（配色），opt_3 暗示缺陷，opt_4 回避回应，均不合适。
